title: Requirements JSON schema validation in CI
description: The CI pipeline must validate all requirement JSON files against the requirement JSON schema. Invalid files must cause the pipeline to fail with a clear error message indicating which file and which validation rule was violated.
rationale: Automated validation ensures requirement files remain consistent and complete throughout the project lifecycle.
author: netkeep80
acceptance_criteria: CI job validates all .json files under requirements/ against the schema
Validation errors are reported with file name and error details
Pipeline fails if any requirement file is invalid
